skill.name: frontend-design
skill.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with focused design direction, refined visual systems, and working implementation guidance.
skill.summary: Guide AI agents to build polished, context-specific frontend interfaces.
skill.author: AgentWorkforce

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported weak cryptographic algorithm and system reconnaissance patterns in SKILL.md. AI review found these alerts are false positives caused by design prose and frontmatter, with no executable code, commands, network access, cryptography, or prompt injection attempt.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged weak cryptographic algorithm patterns on the listed lines, including duplicate alerts on lines 3, 38, and 40. The lines contain YAML frontmatter and frontend design guidance, not cryptographic functions, hashing APIs, encryption calls, or credential handling.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The reviewed file is a 43-line Markdown instruction document. No code path or semantic context supports a real weak cryptography issue.

low_findings.title: False Positive: System Reconnaissance
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged system reconnaissance patterns on the listed lines. These lines discuss interface aesthetics, typography, and visual background details, with no instructions to inspect the host system, enumerate files, collect environment data, or run reconnaissance commands.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged content is descriptive frontend design text. I found no commands, file reads, process inspection, network calls, or data collection behavior.

content.value_statement: Generic AI interfaces often look repetitive and miss the product context. This skill guides Claude, Codex, and Claude Code toward bold, polished frontend work with a clear aesthetic direction.
actual_capabilities: Guides selection of a clear visual direction before implementation.
Encourages production-grade HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, or Vue output.
Improves typography, color, motion, layout, and visual detail choices.
Pushes designs away from generic AI-generated interface patterns.
Adapts complexity to minimalist, maximalist, editorial, playful, or utilitarian styles.
limitations: Does not provide a design system package or reusable component library.
Does not run accessibility, browser, or performance tests by itself.
Depends on the host agent and project tools to create and verify code.
May need user-provided brand, audience, or technical constraints for best results.

use_cases.title: Build a Product Dashboard
use_cases.description: Create a polished dashboard interface with strong hierarchy, refined spacing, and useful interaction states.

use_cases.title: Refresh a Marketing Page
use_cases.description: Turn a plain web page into a more memorable experience with stronger typography, color, and composition.

use_cases.title: Prototype a Creative Web App
use_cases.description: Explore a distinctive interface direction before investing in a full design system.

prompt_templates.title: Design a Simple Component
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the frontend-design skill to create a polished pricing card component for a small SaaS product. Make it responsive and visually distinct.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Page With Direction
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the frontend-design skill to build a landing page for a local music venue. Choose a clear aesthetic direction and implement the first screen.

prompt_templates.title: Improve an Existing Interface
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the frontend-design skill to redesign this dashboard view. Keep the data structure, but improve hierarchy, density, motion, and visual polish.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Full App Experience
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the frontend-design skill to design and implement a responsive task planning app. Include empty, loading, active, and completed states.

output_examples.input: Design a homepage for an architecture studio.
output_examples.output: A responsive homepage concept with editorial typography, strong image placement, restrained motion, and a clear first-viewport brand presence.

output_examples.input: Make this admin panel feel more professional.
output_examples.output: A refined dashboard direction with denser information layout, improved controls, better state handling, and quieter visual styling.

output_examples.input: Create a memorable sign-up flow for a creative tool.
output_examples.output: A multi-step interface direction with distinctive color, purposeful animation, clear validation states, and polished completion feedback.

best_practices: Provide the product purpose, target user, and technical stack before asking for implementation.
Ask for responsive states, interaction states, and empty states when building real product screens.
Review the generated interface in a browser and request specific refinements.
anti_patterns: Asking for a beautiful page without describing the audience or product context.
Accepting generic purple gradients, default fonts, and repetitive card layouts without review.
Skipping accessibility, performance, and cross-browser checks after code generation.

faq.question: Does this skill generate frontend code?
faq.answer: Yes. It guides the agent to implement working frontend code in the stack requested by the user.

faq.question: Can it work with existing design systems?
faq.answer: Yes. Provide the design system constraints so the agent can keep the result consistent.

faq.question: Is this only for landing pages?
faq.answer: No. It can guide components, dashboards, applications, pages, and interface prototypes.

faq.question: Does it replace a human designer?
faq.answer: No. It improves AI-generated interface work, but human review remains important.

faq.question: Does it include security-sensitive behavior?
faq.answer: No. The reviewed skill is a Markdown design guide and contains no executable code.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
